subject: 9-repo config consolidation (76% LoC reduction)
summary: Resolved config-crate sprawl across 9 repos. 5,493 LoC across 9 config crates -> 1,314 LoC across 2 Rust + 1 Python canonical.

decisions.rationale: L3 #48 canonical (typed service settings: url/port/log/db). Confirmed by subagent-B audit.
Active canonical (priority sources, file formats, validation). Use case B (crate config).
Python polyglot counterpart. Pydantic BaseSettings. Field-name parity gap documented.
Not a config library. Request-context only (request_id/span_id/trace_id/headers). Excluded from config consolidation.
CANONICAL.md redirect to phenoShared already in place; zero Cargo.toml consumers.
142 LoC TOML-only cascade; divergent design; superseded by phenoShared core.
1,320 LoC Settly fork (gitlink mode 160000); not a workspace member; zero Cargo.toml consumers.
Phantom reference in QA report. 404 on remote and local. Likely typo for Settly or never created.

pheno submodule pointer bumped in parent (commit 99786846aa)
